old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ckf8","title":"[codereview-2] Updated Zephyr regex misses some possible log formats like 'Send hash=' without colon or 'RECV:' variants (P4 readability/robustness)","description":"The new regex requires 'Send: hash' exactly (with colon) or 'Recv hash'. Zephyr LOG_INF may use 'Send hash=...' or other variants from lora_ping or other samples. Make regex more flexible while keeping specificity e.g. r'(?i)(?:Send|TX).*?hash' with word boundary. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-0k11","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T18:43:03.080117643Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T18:43:03.080117643Z"}

new_value: Regex updated with (?:[:\s]+) to cover 'Send hash=' and 'Recv hash=' variants; all P4 fixed
